text.title: Shift Log Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Did any state change occur during the shift (commit / incident / decision)?

branch.question: Is the pickup_first field concrete (path + named action, ≤200 chars)?
Does any field match a secret-scan regex?

text.example: Concrete walk: AM shift on 2026-05-23: 2 commits + 1 incident + 1 decision → pickup `Resume podcast pipeline at stage 4` (path included) → secret-scan clean → publish.
